item.title: BrentfordFC: Brentford FC @BrentfordFC · 9s Final Fulham prep 1
FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 13s Muy Manero agency confirm Jerayno and Kirayno Schaken both signed with Nathan van
item.description:
Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 13s Muy Manero agency confirm Jerayno and Kirayno Schaken both signed with Nathan van Kooperen from the agency.
Feyenoord and Heerenveen talente are being monitored for the summer window. 3 5 27

item.title: FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 24s Eddie Howe confirms he’s staying at Newcastle: “My fire is burning very, very str
item.description:
Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 24s Eddie Howe confirms he’s staying at Newcastle: “My fire is burning very, very strongly”.
“There’s loads of wood stacked up and I’m ready to put it on. I believe in this project”. 34 26 218 459

item.title: chelseayouth: Nizaar Kinsella reposteó Chelsea Youth @chelseayouth · 3min Ahead of tomorrow's Chelsea vs Man Utd fixture, #CFCDev will
item.description: Nizaar Kinsella reposteó Chelsea Youth @chelseayouth · 3min Ahead of tomorrow's Chelsea vs Man Utd fixture, #CFCDev will lift and parade their trophy for finishing the #PL2 regular season phase top of the table. It should take place around 7.30pm and the academy would appreciate as much support and celebration as possible. 3 14 320
